title: Trump Truth Social: US permanently opening Strait of Hormuz after Iran naval blockade
description: Trump posted on Truth Social (April 15, 2026): US is permanently opening Strait of Hormuz after imposing naval blockade on Iran. States China deal. Cites China.

title: BREAKING: Lebanon remains part of US-Iran ceasefire in effect
description: Lebanon remains part of the US-Iran ceasefire in effect, Pakistan foreign ministry says.

title: Ceasefire was cover for Trump to deceive Iran again
description: This ceasefire was absolutely cover for Trump to deceive Iran again, they should never have accepted. It looks like they might have also been taking advantage of the time though.

title: Iran war deal analysis - who gains what
description: Iran gets assets unfrozen and sanctions relief. USA gets out of war saving money. Saudi/Qatar/Kuwait/Bahrain resume economies. What Pakistan gets: A New loan.

title: BREAKING: Trump says Israel-Lebanon breathing room will happen tomorrow
description: President Trump says he is trying to get a little breathing room between Israel and Lebanon and it will happen tomorrow.

title: USDC Issuer Circle sees tremendous opportunity for Chinese yuan stablecoin
description: USDC Issuer Circle says it sees tremendous opportunity for a Chinese yuan stablecoin.

title: Germany Accelerates Kamikaze Drone Stockpiling With Rheinmetall Deal
